name: @stoa/stabletrust-client
description: Typed HTTP client for the Fairblock StableTrust confidential-token API on Arc. Wraps deposit-to-shield / get-shielded-balance / confidential-transfer / withdraw-to-public with a 30s timeout and an in-memory circuit breaker so Fairblock outages fail fast instead of cascading 30s timeouts into Stoa /analyze latency. Used by Stoa /analyze + /confirm to charge fees confidentially when STOA_USE_STABLETRUST is enabled.
